source: 33-case controlled evidence rollup + 33-case no-write candidate rerun + 33-case human review
controlled_evidence_line_distinction: Controlled dry-run evidence remains provenance for candidate deltas; this artifact is the authorized human-reviewed official baseline score write.

caveats: Wikipedia/API and ZIM-derived context evidence is treated as context/wiki evidence, not overclaimed as dedicated professional book evidence.
No dedicated nature_book PDF was present; karst/hydrology/nature coverage is source-backed through karst, limestone, cenote, Yucatán Peninsula, and related context sources.
Cached Tikal excerpts are supplementary archaeological/context support, not primary nature/geography source backing.
Rejected sources are excluded from formal evidence: zim_raised_field.md, zim_cached_chichen_itza_excerpts.md, local_source_locator_chultun_maya_cisterns.md.
Chultun article is short; chultun/cistern coverage is supplemented by Maya civilization, Tikal excerpts, karst/limestone/cenote context, and Yucatán regional context.

cached Tikal excerpts are supplementary; rejected sources and LP locator are excluded from formal axis evidence.

theme_tracks remains weak unless directly supported by accepted chunks.

No wrong-object, wrong-period, or wrong-culture overclaim.
